gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/91)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/91)
text: نَهَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَنْ طَعَامِ وَلِيمَةٍ يُخَصُّ بِهَا الْأَغْنِيَاءُ وَ يُتْرَكُ الْفُقَرَاءُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad by a chain mentioning it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7th Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> forbade from feeding a banquet (where) the rich are favoured, and poor are neglected.
en.sarwar: 4. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “Abu Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, prohibited feeding during a ceremony, only the rich and not the poor.’”
